title: Claude Plans, Gemini Designs: The Workflow to Build BEAUTIFUL Frontends
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates a workflow that routes frontend development phases to different models: Claude Opus for planning and reasoning, Gemini 3.5 Flash for UI design and code generation, then Opus again for integration and shipping. The approach leverages each model's strengths and cost profile to build complete frontend applications efficiently.
